overview.description: The Innovator Premium Income 15 Buffer ETF - October (LOCT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a consistent income stream and a limited protective buffer against the first 15% of losses stemming from the decline in the S&P 500 Index. The exposure resets each year in October LOCT was launched on Sep 30, 2023 and is issued by Innovator.
